'''rakudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeist|zeist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-k-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeist|zeist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rakudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rækidhith|rækidhith]] || [[word:rækidhij|rækidhij]] || [[word:rækidhish|rækidhish]] || [[word:rækidhi|rækidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rakukudhuth|rakukudhuth]] || [[word:rakukudhuj|rakukudhuj]] || [[word:rakukudhush|rakukudhush]] || [[word:rakukudhu|rakukudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rakudhuth|rakudhuth]] || [[word:rakudhuj|rakudhuj]] || [[word:rakudhush|rakudhush]] || [[word:rakudhu|rakudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rakufdhuth|rakufdhuth]] || [[word:rakufdhuj|rakufdhuj]] || [[word:rakufdhush|rakufdhush]] || [[word:rakufdhuf|rakufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rakudhuthu|rakudhuthu]] || [[word:rakudhuju|rakudhuju]] || [[word:rakudhushu|rakudhushu]] || [[word:rakudhuku|rakudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rakudhuth|rakudhuth]] || [[word:rakudhuj|rakudhuj]] || [[word:rakudhush|rakudhush]] || [[word:rakudhu|rakudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rakudhuthul|rakudhuthul]] || [[word:rakudhujul|rakudhujul]] || [[word:rakudhushul|rakudhushul]] || [[word:rakudhukul|rakudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rakudhuthuthu|rakudhuthuthu]] || [[word:rakudhujuju|rakudhujuju]] || [[word:rakudhushushu|rakudhushushu]] || [[word:rakudhuku|rakudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rakudhuthun|rakudhuthun]] || [[word:rakudhujun|rakudhujun]] || [[word:rakudhushun|rakudhushun]] || [[word:rakudhukun|rakudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rakudhuthuoro|rakudhuthuoro]] || [[word:rakudhujuoro|rakudhujuoro]] || [[word:rakudhushuoro|rakudhushuoro]] || [[word:rakudhukuoro|rakudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
